---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's currently difficult or impossible?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. If it adds a new flag or changes existing behavior, sketch the CLI usage:

```bash
./proton-pack.sh --your-new-flag ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other ways to solve this you've thought about, and why this approach seems best.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, similar features in other tools (Lutris, Heroic, Bottles, ProtonUp-Qt), etc.

---

> If this is more of an open question than a concrete proposal (e.g. "should we support store X?"), consider opening a **Discussion** instead — it's a better format for back-and-forth before a spec is settled.
